intro: IncidentIQ is a full-stack AI incident management platform that demonstrates how modern LLM orchestration can transform IT operations. It uses a multi-agent architecture powered by LangGraph to automatically triage, correlate, and diagnose production incidents — with a human-in-the-loop for critical decisions.
features: Real-time incident dashboard with severity tracking
AI-powered root cause analysis (RCA) using LangGraph agents
RAG-based knowledge retrieval from runbooks & past incidents
Conversational AI assistant with CopilotKit integration
